title: linkedin_output
description: Output contract for linkedin-alan-post skill when pipeline_mode=true. Consumes research_output from weekly-ai-research; emits a ready-to-paste LinkedIn post in Alan Vazquez's voice.

pattern_used.description: Pattern A=Built This, B=Macro, C=Industry Reaction (default), E=Tool Comparison. Pattern D (milestone) excluded — never auto-generated from weekly research.

source_research_actor.description: research_output.narrative.biggest_move.actor — the news anchor for Pattern C posts.

hook.description: Single-line opener. Must be one of: diagnostic question, contrarian reframe, news-to-implication, data-first provocation. Banned: 'I'm excited to announce', 'In today's fast-paced world', etc.

body.description: Full post body including hook as first line. 200-350 words. Paragraphs 1-3 sentences. Generous line breaks (\n\n). No emojis. No markdown bold.

items.description: Single hashtag with leading #. CamelCase. Drawn from Hashtag Library in SKILL.md.

char_count.description: LinkedIn post body character count (excluding hashtags). LinkedIn hard limit is 3000.

ready_to_paste.description: True only when post passes Quality Checklist in SKILL.md. Coordinator gates dispatch on this.

cta.description: Closing line. Engagement invite for A/B/E; provocation for C.

pattern_rationale.description: Why this pattern was selected over the others, in 1-2 sentences.

alan_voice_check.description: Self-audit: confirms practitioner-first phrasing, no superlatives, no self-promotion labels, no filler. Cites the specific Alan-voice tells in this draft.

limitations_included.description: True iff the post explicitly names limitations or caveats of the tool/thesis discussed. Required for credibility.

ai_alpha_beta_thesis_present.description: True when the post leans on Alan's AI Alpha → Beta thesis (commoditization → judgment edge). Typical for Pattern C.

sources_cited.description: Named sources, datasets, or research houses referenced in body. e.g. 'Bridgewater 2025', 'Anthropic release notes 2026-05-08'.

credentials_used.description: Audit trail of which Alan facts were referenced. Must come from the 'Who Alan Is' allowlist in SKILL.md — coordinator rejects fabricated credentials.

quality_checklist_passed.description: All 17 Quality Checklist items in linkedin-alan-post SKILL.md passed.
